transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I have a small request. I want to change my appointment from morning to an afternoon slot if possible. Same day, same doctor.
AGENT: Sure, I can try to arrange that. Name and current appointment details?
CALLER: Vaibhav Kamath. I have 9 AM tomorrow with Dr. Nitin Kadam, gastroenterology.
AGENT: Let me check Dr. Kadam's afternoon slots tomorrow... He has 2:30 PM available. Does that work?
CALLER: Yes! 2:30 PM is perfect. Thank you.
AGENT: Switched from 9 AM to 2:30 PM tomorrow for Vaibhav Kamath with Dr. Kadam. Updated SMS on its way!
CALLER: Brilliant, thanks.
